name: ROC / Companies Act
description: Companies Act 2013 filings — Board Meetings, AGM, annual returns, director disclosures, statutory registers.

items.title: Board Meeting
items.description: Minimum 4 board meetings in a calendar year; gap not exceeding 120 days between consecutive meetings.
items.notes: Keep minutes and attendance register updated within 30 days of the meeting.

items.title: Update statutory registers
items.description: Registers of members, directors, charges, contracts and related-party transactions — reviewed and updated.

items.title: Director interest disclosure (MBP-1)
items.description: Fresh MBP-1 from every director at the first board meeting of each FY.

items.title: Director non-disqualification (DIR-8)
items.description: Annual declaration from every director that they are not disqualified u/s 164.

items.title: MSME Form I
items.description: Half-yearly return of MSME vendor payments outstanding beyond 45 days. Filed in April (Oct-Mar period) and October (Apr-Sep period).

items.title: Return of Deposits (DPT-3)
items.description: Annual return of outstanding loans / deposits / non-deposit money received.

items.title: Annual General Meeting (AGM)
items.description: Hold AGM within 6 months of FY end (30 September).

items.title: DIR-3 KYC (Directors)
items.description: Annual KYC by every director holding DIN.
items.penalty: Rs.5,000 for late filing + DIN deactivation

items.title: File AOC-4 (Financials)
items.description: File audited financial statements with ROC within 30 days of AGM.

items.title: File MGT-7 / MGT-7A (Annual Return)
items.description: Annual return with ROC within 60 days of AGM. MGT-7A for small companies and OPCs.

items.title: CSR-2 filing (if applicable)
items.description: Report on CSR activities as an addendum to AOC-4, for companies covered u/s 135.

items.title: File ADT-1 (Auditor appointment)
items.description: File intimation of auditor appointment / re-appointment within 15 days of AGM.
